nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=88 beats='{HERO} reaches the foot of the cursed {TOWER} as {OPENING_MOMENT} begins to fall, {GOAL} at its summit dark for a hundred years; four ways lead to the {TOWER} base, {AP1_NAME}, {AP2_NAME}, {AP3_NAME}, and {AP4_NAME}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='the causeway stones shift underfoot but hold, and the great {ENTRANCE} looms ahead, half open on darkness'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='the ivy tears loose in {HERO} grip but a lower window gives onto the entry hall, and {ENTRANCE} stands just within'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='{AP3_NAME} forks in the dark, one branch sloping up toward {ENTRANCE}, the other dropping into {AP3_DEADEND}'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=58 beats='the downward branch ends in a collapsed sump full of black water, and {HERO} must turn back to wait for a safer night to try the climb again'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='{AP4_NAME} is a trap, its steps hinged over a pit, and {HERO} scrambles back to solid ground as the night thickens, driven off before the climb even starts'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=78 beats='inside {ENTRANCE} the air is cold and old; a stair descends into the sound of water while a warmer draught rises from a side arch, and somewhere above {GOAL} waits'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='the warm draught leads to {B_FURNACE}, a dead end, but a maintenance ladder in the corner rejoins the descending stair'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='the stair spirals down worn and green with damp until it opens on the lapping edge of {TIER_U}, the first tier of the climb'>>
<<FILL role=hub words=82 beats='{HERO} wades into {TIER_U} where black water laps the drowned stair and three archways breathe cold air; the first {U_SHARD} is said to rest under the sluice'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the water rises to {HERO} waist as broken lantern-glass drifts past and a current tugs toward a {U_GATE} ahead'>>
<<FILL role=bottleneck words=84 beats='the {U_GATE} bars the way, its wheel seized with rust and weed; beyond it the {U_SHARD} glints on a submerged plinth'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='the sluice grinds open and {HERO} hauls the {U_SHARD} free, one of three, then finds the spiral stair climbing out of the water toward warmer stone'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='the flanking passage skirts wide around {TIER_U} and rejoins the way just before the barrier'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=61 beats='the side chamber of {TIER_U} is choked with wreckage that {HERO} must clear by hand'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=72 beats='past the wreckage two ways open, a narrow crawl back toward the barrier and a sagging floor over open dark'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the sagging floor gives way and drops {HERO} into a sealed vault below {TIER_U}, the trapdoor slamming shut overhead, and the only choice left is to wait and climb again another night'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=69 beats='beyond the near door a corridor of {TIER_U} runs long and lightless, the ceiling dripping'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='the corridor ends at a choice of two low arches, one breathing cold air, one warm and close'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=58 beats='the cold arch opens on a sheer shaft with no floor, and {HERO} backs out just in time, driven down a tier by the near fall and forced to begin the ascent again'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='the warm arch is a nest of {TOWER} vermin that swarm the light, and {HERO} retreats coughing into the dark, the way lost for tonight'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=55 beats='the low path of {TIER_U} slopes down into standing water and colder air'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=63 beats='the passage narrows until {HERO} must turn sideways between wet stone'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=74 beats='the ceiling drops lower and the way ahead pinches almost shut'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the low path dead-ends at a caved-in wall with no way through, and {HERO} is turned back from {TIER_U}, the climb halted before it truly began'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='the far gallery of {TIER_U} is quiet, and in a dry alcove {HERO} finds an old climber cache of rope and chalk'>>

choices.label: Take the cache and press on.
Rest a moment in the alcove.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=discovery words=64 beats='the alcove is warm and safe and the cache is a small mercy, but resting here {HERO} lets the hour slip; the night deepens and {TIER_U} must be left for a stronger attempt'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=67 beats='rope coiled and hands chalked, the gallery bends back toward the main barrier by a hidden fault in the wall'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the risky bypass climbs outside the barrier along a crumbling ledge of {TIER_U}'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the crumbling ledge shears away under {HERO} boot and only a lucky handhold saves the fall, but the bypass is gone and the barrier undefeated, so the tier turns {HERO} back'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=76 beats='probing the barrier mechanism of {TIER_U}, {HERO} finds a release lever and a tangle of counterweights that could go either way'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='cutting the counterweights drops the whole barrier into a locked position with a boom, sealing the way for good tonight, and {HERO} climbs back down to try again'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='the search for another handhold leads {HERO} out onto the raw face of {TIER_U}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='the holds run out and the wind or water pulls hard at every finger'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='there is simply no way around the barrier here, and clinging on grows too dangerous, so {HERO} retreats down a tier to find a safer night'>>
<<FILL role=hub words=80 beats='the outer galleries of {TIER_U} spread out in a maze of side passages, each promising a way up and most leading nowhere good'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=61 beats='passage 1 of {TIER_U} narrows and turns, the light failing behind'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=69 beats='loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=55 beats='the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_U} for tonight, to climb again another night'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=63 beats='passage 2 of {TIER_U} narrows and turns, the light failing behind'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=74 beats='loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_U} for tonight, to climb again another night'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_U} for tonight, to climb again another night'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='passage 4 of {TIER_U} narrows and turns, the light failing behind'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=61 beats='the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_U} for tonight, to climb again another night'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=69 beats='passage 5 of {TIER_U} narrows and turns, the light failing behind'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=55 beats='loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=63 beats='the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_U} for tonight, to climb again another night'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=74 beats='passage 6 of {TIER_U} narrows and turns, the light failing behind'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_U} for tonight, to climb again another night'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=67 beats='passage 7 of {TIER_U} narrows and turns, the light failing behind'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_U} for tonight, to climb again another night'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='passage 8 of {TIER_U} narrows and turns, the light failing behind'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=61 beats='loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_U} for tonight, to climb again another night'>>
<<FILL role=hub words=82 beats='{TIER_C} tick and turn, brass automata frozen mid-stride while great gears grind overhead; the {C_SHARD} sits locked in a stalled mechanism'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=69 beats='{HERO} edges between {C_DIRECT} that sweep the floor in slow bright arcs, timing each step to the ticking of the {TOWER} heart'>>
<<FILL role=bottleneck words=84 beats='a {C_GATE} blocks the gallery, teeth locked on a snapped brass key; the {C_SHARD} rides the hub of the wheel just out of reach'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=55 beats='the freed gear turns with a shudder and the {C_SHARD} drops into {HERO} palm, two of three, as a brass stair unfolds toward the next tier'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=63 beats='the flanking passage skirts wide around {TIER_C} and rejoins the way just before the barrier'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=74 beats='the side chamber of {TIER_C} is choked with wreckage that {HERO} must clear by hand'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=72 beats='past the wreckage two ways open, a narrow crawl back toward the barrier and a sagging floor over open dark'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the sagging floor gives way and drops {HERO} into a sealed vault below {TIER_C}, the trapdoor slamming shut overhead, and the only choice left is to wait and climb again another night'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='beyond the near door a corridor of {TIER_C} runs long and lightless, the ceiling dripping'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='the corridor ends at a choice of two low arches, one breathing cold air, one warm and close'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=58 beats='the cold arch opens on a sheer shaft with no floor, and {HERO} backs out just in time, driven down a tier by the near fall and forced to begin the ascent again'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=56 beats='the warm arch is a nest of {TOWER} vermin that swarm the light, and {HERO} retreats coughing into the dark, the way lost for tonight'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=67 beats='the low path of {TIER_C} slopes down into standing water and colder air'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the passage narrows until {HERO} must turn sideways between wet stone'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='the ceiling drops lower and the way ahead pinches almost shut'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the low path dead-ends at a caved-in wall with no way through, and {HERO} is turned back from {TIER_C}, the climb halted before it truly began'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='the far gallery of {TIER_C} is quiet, and in a dry alcove {HERO} finds an old climber cache of rope and chalk'>>

Rest a moment in the alcove.

<<FILL role=hub words=82 beats='{TIER_L} climbs into darkness, shelf upon shelf murmuring in dead languages while loose pages drift like moths; the {L_SHARD} is bound inside a locked ledger'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='the whispers sharpen into half-heard warnings and {L_GATE} unfolds from the stacks, watching {HERO} with inkblot eyes'>>
<<FILL role=bottleneck words=84 beats='{L_GATE} blocks the ladder to the upper stacks and will not let a climber pass without answering the riddle carved in the reading-desk'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=67 beats='the riddle answered, the ledger falls open and the {L_SHARD} lifts from the page, three of three, while a hidden stair spirals up toward the wind'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the flanking passage skirts wide around {TIER_L} and rejoins the way just before the barrier'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='the side chamber of {TIER_L} is choked with wreckage that {HERO} must clear by hand'>>

<<FILL role=hub words=82 beats='{TIER_R} ring the {TOWER} under a bruised sky, narrow ledges slick with spray and stone gargoyles crouched along {R_BRIDGE} that has half fallen away'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='the gale shoves {HERO} against the parapet and {R_BRIDGE} groans, one span still standing over a long dark drop to the clouds below'>>
<<FILL role=bottleneck words=84 beats='{R_GATE} wakes, a great stone sentinel that steps from the rampart wall to bar the last stair, eyes lit with the old {CURSE}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=61 beats='the sentinel outwitted, it grinds back into the wall and the final stair stands open, {GOAL} chamber glowing faintly at the top of the world'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=69 beats='the flanking passage skirts wide around {TIER_R} and rejoins the way just before the barrier'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=55 beats='the side chamber of {TIER_R} is choked with wreckage that {HERO} must clear by hand'>>

choices.label: Take the cache and press on.
Rest a moment in the alcove.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=discovery words=64 beats='the alcove is warm and safe and the cache is a small mercy, but resting here {HERO} lets the hour slip; the night deepens and {TIER_R} must be left for a stronger attempt'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='rope coiled and hands chalked, the gallery bends back toward the main barrier by a hidden fault in the wall'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='the risky bypass climbs outside the barrier along a crumbling ledge of {TIER_R}'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the crumbling ledge shears away under {HERO} boot and only a lucky handhold saves the fall, but the bypass is gone and the barrier undefeated, so the tier turns {HERO} back'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=76 beats='probing the barrier mechanism of {TIER_R}, {HERO} finds a release lever and a tangle of counterweights that could go either way'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='cutting the counterweights drops the whole barrier into a locked position with a boom, sealing the way for good tonight, and {HERO} climbs back down to try again'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=61 beats='the search for another handhold leads {HERO} out onto the raw face of {TIER_R}'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=69 beats='the holds run out and the wind or water pulls hard at every finger'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='there is simply no way around the barrier here, and clinging on grows too dangerous, so {HERO} retreats down a tier to find a safer night'>>
<<FILL role=hub words=80 beats='the outer galleries of {TIER_R} spread out in a maze of side passages, each promising a way up and most leading nowhere good'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=55 beats='passage 1 of {TIER_R} narrows and turns, the light failing behind'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=63 beats='loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=74 beats='the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_R} for tonight, to climb again another night'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='passage 2 of {TIER_R} narrows and turns, the light failing behind'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=67 beats='loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_R} for tonight, to climb again another night'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='passage 3 of {TIER_R} narrows and turns, the light failing behind'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=72 beats='loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_R} for tonight, to climb again another night'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=61 beats='passage 4 of {TIER_R} narrows and turns, the light failing behind'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=69 beats='loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=55 beats='the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_R} for tonight, to climb again another night'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_R} for tonight, to climb again another night'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=67 beats='passage 6 of {TIER_R} narrows and turns, the light failing behind'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_R} for tonight, to climb again another night'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=61 beats='the way pinches down until {HERO} can barely squeeze ahead'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=69 beats='passage 8 of {TIER_R} narrows and turns, the light failing behind'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=55 beats='loose stone shifts and the air grows close and stale'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the passage ends against blank {TOWER} stone with no way on, and {HERO} must back out and give up {TIER_R} for tonight, to climb again another night'>>

<<FILL role=hub words=86 beats='{GOAL} chamber crowns the {TOWER}, its great dark lantern cold at the center while {OPENING_MOMENT} gathers at the glass and the three {SHARD}s hum in {HERO}’s hands'>>

choices.label: Brace the doors against the night.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the {SHARD}s must be set into the lantern {CROWN} in the right order or the {CURSE} will smother the {SPARK}; {GOAL} mechanism waits, patient and dark'>>
<<FILL role=bottleneck words=88 beats='the {CURSE} itself rises as {SHADOW} across the lantern, whispering that the night is kinder than the climb and that {HERO} should set the {SHARD}s down'>>
<<FILL role=climax words=84 beats='{HERO} refuses {SHADOW} and fits the three {SHARD}s to the {CROWN}, and the old mechanism drinks the light and begins to warm beneath both hands'>>

<<FILL role=climax words=80 beats='the {CROWN} warms and the first true light in a hundred years gathers under {HERO}’s hands, but {SHADOW} claws at the glass one last time and the order of the final turn must be chosen'>>

choices.label: Turn the {CROWN} sunwise, as the log said.
Turn the {CROWN} widdershins, to spite the {CURSE}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=resolution words=96 beats='sunwise the {CROWN} turns and {GOAL} blazes gold across the whole coast, {OPENING_MOMENT} breaking apart and the {CURSE} unspooling into morning; the {TOWER} stands lit and free, and {HERO} is the {KEEPER} who climbed the whole cursed {TOWER} and brought the light back'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=74 beats='widdershins the {CROWN} fights back and the gathered light gutters out in a cold rush, {SHADOW} laughing as it fades, and {HERO} is left in the dark chamber having reached the very top yet failing the last turn, to rest and try the final ritual again'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=70 beats='forced too soon {SPARK} leaps wild and throws {HERO} back from the {CROWN}, the {SHARD}s scattering across the floor; {GOAL} stays dark and {OPENING_MOMENT} holds, so the climber must gather the {SHARD}s and steady before trying once more'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='circling {GOAL} chamber {HERO} finds the old {KEEPER} log open on a lectern, its last page describing the sunwise turn of the {CROWN}'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=72 beats='studying {SHADOW}, {HERO} sees it flinches from the {SHARD}s light; there is a moment to strike past it or to keep watching and lose it'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='watching {SHADOW} too long, {HERO} feels the night pour in and the cold take the chamber; the moment passes and the climb must be abandoned to the dark, to be attempted again'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='in a cold alcove {HERO} finds the last {KEEPER}, only bones and a ring of keys now, one key still fitting the {CROWN} housing'>>

<<FILL role=discovery words=66 beats='bracing the great doors, {HERO} holds the night out for one long hour and buys the coast a little dawn, but {GOAL} stays dark behind and the true climb is left unfinished for a braver night'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='bargaining, {HERO} offers {SHADOW} a single {SHARD} for safe passage, and it reaches out a smoke-cold hand to take the bargain'>>

choices.label: Snatch the {SHARD} back and run for the {CROWN}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=64 beats='{SHADOW} takes the {SHARD} and swallows the light with it, and now only two {SHARD}s remain, not enough to wake the {CROWN}; {HERO} retreats down the {TOWER} to seek the lost {SHARD} another night'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=62 beats='setting the {SHARD}s blind, {HERO} feels for the housings in the dark and gets two seated true before the third resists'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the third {SHARD} jams half-seated and the {CROWN} locks against it, refusing the light until it is cleared; {HERO} must climb down, rest, and come back to seat the {SHARD}s in the light'>>

<<FILL role=climax words=78 beats='{SHARD}s snatched back and clutched tight, {HERO} sprints the last curve of the chamber ahead of {SHADOW} and reaches the {CROWN} from the far side, breath ragged, the housings open and waiting'>>

choices.label: Set the {SHARD}s from the far side.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=resolution words=90 beats='from the far side {HERO} drives the three {SHARD}s home all at once and the {CROWN} catches with a roar of gold, {GOAL} flaring to life and {SHADOW} torn apart; it is not the {KEEPER} way but it is a lit {TOWER} and an ending to {OPENING_MOMENT}, won by nerve and a clever line'>>
